en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid form in the Netherlands SNA NEN 4400 Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

Companies can download a copy of their SNA (NEN 4400) Certification through the official Labour Standards Register.
NEN 4400-1 standard
Please upload a copy of your company's SNA NEN 4400-1 or NEN 4400-2 certification, confirming your company’s compliance with NEN 4400 standard.
